generic_rules: Place AGREE contracts within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Component type contracts should use component type scope; implementation contracts should use implementation scope.
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Ensure all AGREE variables are grounded in the AADL model or explicitly declared.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to directly use AADL property names (e.g., Deadline, Period) as AGREE variables without explicit ports or constants.
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
